offer: For logistics carriers processing 50–100 shipments/day, delayed tracking updates cause late orders. We aggregate daily shipment tracking updates and send exception alerts instead of manual tracking and updates via email or spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to track shipment exceptions in real-time, leading to delayed responses.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics carriers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions on similar issues
DM outreach to logistics carriers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for logistics tools
try_it: Let users try Daily shipment tracking aggregation and Real-time exception alerts on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
